## Type of Change

- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `pnpm format` and `pnpm lint`
- [ ] I have run `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm test`
- [ ] I have run `pnpm validate` (Terraform fmt + validation)
- [ ] I have updated documentation as needed
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
